gold: Tôi không cần. Tại vì tôi không biết in nên là tôi muốn được hỗ trợ để in ra giấy.

sigWerErrors.reason: Difference is only in capitalization, which does not affect meaning.
The insertion of 'cần' (need) after 'không cần' (don't need) creates a contradiction and confusion in meaning.
The difference is only punctuation, which does not affect meaning.
The insertion of 'có' (have) in 'không có biết in' instead of 'không biết in' is a minor grammatical difference and does not change the overall meaning.
'nên' (so/therefore) and 'đang' (currently) have different meanings, which changes the logical flow of the sentence.
